programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08

programme.title: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09

programme.title: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10

programme.title: 2020. Na aldeia com Tazuna, Sakura vê o sofrimento do povo no País das Ondas governado por Gato. Tazuna constrói uma ponte que dará acesso a outras terras para as pessoas não dependerem mais de Gato. Naruto e Sasuke treinam, usando chakra para subir em árvore. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu - T01E11

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto treina para controlar seu chacra, alguém misterioso aparece de repente e diz que, para se tornar forte, é preciso ter determinação para proteger o que ama. A figura misteriosa ecoa o sentimento de Naruto, e os dois sentem uma conexão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Na Ponte: Zabuza Retorna - T01E12

programme.title: 2020. É hora de lutar contra Zabuza outra vez, e agora ele está acompanhado do ninja rastreador. Os dois reparam as habilidades de Sasuke, e ele percebe o imenso poder do ninja mascarado. Sasuke e o ninja se preparam para lutar, como se o destino os chamasse. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo
programme.desc: Naruto: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo - T01E13

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke está em apuros dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku, e Naruto chega para salvá-lo. Sasuke tem um plano para combater o jutsu de Haku, mas falha por causa das ações inesperadas de Naruto. Por fim, os dois jovens ninjas são presos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga - T01E14

programme.title: 2020. Vendo que não há tempo a perder, Kakashi decide usar o Sharingan mais uma vez para derrotar Zabuza. Mas Zabuza é um ninja experiente em batalhas mortais e, na primeira vez em que enfrentou o Sharingan, Zabuza conseguiu bolar uma estratégia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Visibilidade Zero: O Sharingan Desvendado - T01E15

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke são atacados dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku. Durante a batalha, Sasuke percebe o poder do seu próprio Sharingan e começa a desviar dos ataques de Haku. Haku decide acabar com ele. Sasuke usa seu corpo para proteger Naruto... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Selo Quebrado - T01E16

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente explode! Sua raiva por Haku libera o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. O chakra de Naruto está tão intenso que até Kakashi e Zabuza, que estão lutando à distância, percebem. Haku é incapaz de fazer algo diante do poder secreto de Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Passado Branco, Ambição Escondida - T01E17

programme.title: 2020. Haku pede a Naruto que acabe com ele. Naruto questiona a filosofia de Haku sobre existir apenas para lutar e ganhar. Enquanto isso, a batalha entre Kakashi e Zabuza chega ao clímax. Com a vitória ao alcance, Kakashi libera sua manobra mais devastadora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Armas Conhecidas Como Shinobi - T01E18

programme.title: 2020. Pensando em Haku, Naruto confronta Zabuza com raiva. Sem demonstrar emoções, Zabuza se sente arrasado pela perda de Haku, a única pessoa em quem confiava no mundo. Naruto aprende que esse tipo de realidade cruel é, de fato, o destino de um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Demônio Na Neve - T01E19

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe voltam à Aldeia Oculta da Folha depois da batalha do País das Ondas. Mesmo concluindo novas missões, Naruto está insatisfeito com a rotina diária, mas logo ele descobre que estrangeiros estão se juntando na Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin - T01E20

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura são escolhidos para fazer a Prova Chunin. Iruka se opõe à participação dos três, pois os considera muito novos e inexperientes para o desafio. Kakashi, porém, acredita que eles cresceram e estão mais prontos do que nunca. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Identifique-Se : Novos E Poderosos Rivais - T01E21

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se preparam para a prova, um ninja chamado Rock Lee aparece. Lee quer lutar contra Sasuke, que possui o poder do clã Uchiha. Sasuke aceita o desafio de Lee, mas fica só na defesa devido aos ataques rápidos desse oponente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke - T01E22

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se inscrevem oficialmente para a Prova Chunin e formam um time. Para passar, nenhum membro pode falhar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam - T01E23

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe iniciam a primeira prova. O examinador é Ibiki Morino, um jonin (ninja de alto nível) notório e perito em interrogração. Sasuke e Sakura estão preocupados, pois se Naruto responder tudo errado, eles também falharão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa
programme.desc: Naruto: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa - T01E24

programme.title: 2020. A parte mais difícil da prova começa na pergunta 10. Antes dos ninjas escutarem a pergunta, Ibiki coloca uma regra injusta para o problema: quem responder errado será reprovado e não terá o direito de fazer qualquer Prova Chunin no futuro. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada - T01E25

programme.title: 2020. Konohamaru, neto do Terceiro Hokage da Aldeia da Folha, aparece durante a Prova Chunin com Moegi e Udon e cobre eventos para o jornal da Academia Ninja. Ele vê Naruto como um irmão mais velho e, entrevistando os personagens, reconta suas aventuras. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta Da Morte - T01E26

programme.title: 2020. Na floresta da morte começa a segunda parte da Prova Chunin. Cada time recebe um tipo de pergaminho e deve roubar o outro tipo de outro time, chegando ao ponto final na torre com os dois pergaminhos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte - T01E27

programme.title: 2020. A segunda parte da prova começa na floresta da morte. Sasuke nota que um inimigo se disfarçou de Naruto. Sasuke salva e desamarra Naruto, e os três membros criam uma senha para quando ficarem separados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta
programme.desc: Naruto: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta - T01E28

programme.title: 2020. O ataque do ninja da Grama é poderoso demais para Sasuke e Sakura. Sasuke pensa em entregar o pergaminho, mas Naruto o impede. A raiva de Naruto cresce e seus poderes são revelados. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda! - T01E29

programme.title: 2020. Ao ver Naruto lutar contra o ninja da Grama, Sasuke percebe que estava errado em fugir. Sasuke usa todo o potencial do seu Sharingan para afastar o ninja. Ele se apresenta como Orochimaru, some e deixa uma Marca da Maldição em Sasuke, que cai em dor. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão - T01E30

programme.title: 2020. Depois de ver a reportagem, Anko percebe um intruso na prova, Orochimaru, mas não consegue detê-lo. Sakura, cansada e com medo, tenta impedir o inimigo. O autoproclamado demônio bonitão da Aldeia da Folha, Rock Lee, aparece para o resgate! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção
programme.desc: Naruto: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção - T01E31

programme.title: 2020. Protegendo Sakura, que não consegue mais se mover, Lee luta contra os três ninja do Som. Ele usa sua habilidade secreta, mas é ineficaz. Dosu o ataca, e Lee cai. Para proteger as pessoas que são importantes para ela, Sakura se levanta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Sakura Floresce - T01E32

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Sakura se defende dos ninjas do Som sozinha, o time rival Ino aparece! Depois de ver Sakura lutar contra os ninjas do Som, eles decidem ajudá-la. Com a formação de batalha "Ino-Shika-Cho", o time Ino tenta deter os atacantes… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Formação De Batalha: Ino-Shika-Cho - T01E33

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som partem depois de enfrentar o poder de Sasuke. O time de Naruto tem um momento para se recuperar. Kiba consegue o segundo pergaminho e seu time vai em direção à torre. O parceiro canino de Kiba, Akamaru, nota algo adiante e para. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara - T01E34

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe finalmente descansam. Já se passaram quatro dias desde o início da prova, restando apenas um para o fim. Naruto sugere duplicar o pergaminho do céu, que ainda precisam ter, e tenta abrir o pergaminho da terra, supostamente selado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar
programme.desc: Naruto: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar - T01E35

programme.title: 2020. O time de Naruto se junta a Kabuto, mas eles são presos por um genjutsu (técnica ilusória). Eles caminham na mesma área várias vezes, perdem energia e lutam contra os vários clones criados pela técnica. Naruto os derrota, mas o número não diminui. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus
programme.desc: Naruto: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus - T01E36

programme.title: 2020. Quando Naruto e seu time chegam à a torre e abrem os dois pergaminhos, Iruka aparece e explica o espírito do ninja chunin (nível médio) aos estudantes da Academia Ninja. Agora ele confia em Naruto e seu time. Anko fala com o Hokage sobre Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez
programme.desc: Naruto: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez - T01E37

programme.title: 2020. Os 21 ninjas que passaram na segunda parte da prova se juntam para o próximo desafio. Seus rostos demonstram várias emoções profundas. Mas como um número muito alto passou na segunda prova, as preliminares da terceira começarão imediatamente... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação!
programme.desc: Naruto: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação! - T01E38

programme.title: 2020. Na terceira prova os combates são um contra um. O primeiro é entre Sasuke e Yoroi, o capanga de Orochimaru. Yoroi encurrala Sasuke, que não consegue usar seu Sharingan por causa da Marca da Maldição no pescoço. Yoroi absorve o chakra para fora de Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta! - T01E39

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi desfaz o feitiço de Sasuke, e Orochimaru aparece. Ele quer o poder de Sharingan que o clã Uchiha possui. Nas preliminares da terceira prova, Zaku da Aldeia Escondida do Som luta contra Shino da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara - T01E40

programme.title: 2020. O próximo combate é entre o membro do time de Gaara, Kankuro, e o capanga de Orochimaru, Misumi. Misumi captura Kankuro, usando um corpo que consegue deslocar suas partes e juntas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam - T01E41

programme.title: 2020. O quarto combate é entre Sakura e Ino, amigas de infância e ambas apaixonadas por Sasuke. Embora Sakura tenha admirado Ino desde pequena, ela não hesita em enfrentá-la, e as duas ninjas aparentam ter o mesmo nível e determinação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Final: Cha! - T01E42

programme.title: 2020. O quinto combate é entre Tenten e Temari. Tenten, mestre em armas aéreas e várias outras, que são repelidas pelo leque de Temari. O sexto combate é entre Shikamaru e Kin. Kin parece estar em vantagem, mas Shikamaru usa seu Jutsu Possessão da Sombra. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru
programme.desc: Naruto: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru - T01E43

programme.title: 2020. No sétimo combate, Naruto enfrenta Kiba, que traz seu cachorro Akamaru. Kiba usa o Jutsu Quatro Patas para atacar Naruto, que consegue virar a mesa. Entretanto, Akamaru e Kiba consomem Pílulas de Comida e começam um ataque intenso contra Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro?
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro? - T01E44

programme.title: 2020. Depois de consumir Pílulas de Comida, os níveis de chakra de Kiba e Akamaru aumentam, e ambos começam a contra-atacar Naruto. Naruto usa Jutsu de Transformação contra Kiba e tenta ganhar com uma nova manobra secreta. O que será que Naruto planejou?! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto - T01E45

programme.title: 2020. No oitavo combate, os primos Hinata e Neji do clã Hyuga se enfrentam. Embora a tímida Hinata não seja páreo para a agressividade de Neji, ela consegue ganhar força ao escutar as palavras de Naruto. Como será que esta batalha terminará? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Byakugan: Hinata Ganha Coragem! - T01E46

programme.title: 2020. Hinata enfrenta Neji, mas ele ataca o ponto de pressão dela com Byakugan (olhos brancos). O fluxo de chakra de Hinata para, e ela quase perde a consciência. Ela encontra coragem ao lembrar como Naruto não desiste de nenhuma dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Derrota Digna - T01E47

programme.title: 2020. No nono combate, Gaara finalmente aparece e seu oponente é Lee, um especialista em taijutsu (técnica física). Lee usa esta poderosa técnica contra Gaara, que manipula areia de sua cabaça. Então, a Armadura de Areia de Gaara finalmente se solta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode
programme.desc: Naruto: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode - T01E48

programme.title: 2020. Lee usa a técnica banida, Lótus Primária, para atacar Gaara. A luta parece ter terminado, mas a manobra apenas danifica a proteção feita pela areia de Gaara. Imóvel após de ter usado Lótus Primária, Lee é lançado facilmente por toda parte por Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido
programme.desc: Naruto: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido - T01E49

programme.title: 2020. Lee decide usar a manobra proibida, Lótus Oculta, que libera três ou mais dos oito portais que possuem a concentração dos pontos de chakra. Quando os oito portais se abrem, o usuário pode morrer. Mas Gaara responde com seu próprio ataque, Ataúde de Areia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido
programme.desc: Naruto: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido - T01E50

programme.title: 2020. No último combate das preliminares, Choji luta contra o capanga de Orochimaru, Dosu. As preliminares finalmente terminam, e o Hokage revela a terceira prova, enquanto Orochimaru começa secretamente seu plano maligno. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Sombra Na Escuridão: O Perigo Se Aproxima De Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Sombra Na Escuridão: O Perigo Se Aproxima De Sasuke - T01E51

programme.title: 2020. Na preparação para a terceira prova, Kakashi escolhe Ebisu para treinar Naruto. Ebisu diz a Naruto que ele ainda não controla seu chakra o suficiente e o faz caminhar sobre água. Naruto aprende rápido e impressiona Ebisu. Então, uma figura aparece... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ebisu Volta: O Treinamento Mais Duro De Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ebisu Volta: O Treinamento Mais Duro De Naruto - T01E52

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya, um dos Sannin lendários, aparece de repente diante de Ebisu e Naruto. Naruto dá a Jiraiya o apelido de "Sábio Tarado". Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Após Muito Tempo...Jiraiya Retorna! - T01E53

programme.title: 2020. Gaara se transforma em Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e obtém uma vitória impressionante. Depois da batalha, alguns descobrem novos caminhos para seguir, e Naruto decide ser ainda mais forte ao ir numa jornada de treinamento com Jiraiya. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Partida - T01E220

programme.title: 2020. Bem-vindo à Aldeia Oculta da folha, onde ninjas assassinos percorrem a terra, e o travesso Naruto Uzumaki apronta encrenca aonde for. Ao roubar o antigo pergaminho do selo, ele libera um poder único raramente visto em um garoto de 12 anos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Naruto Uzumaki Chegando! - T01E01

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente se forma na Academia Ninja e diz que sabe tudo. Bom, pelo menos é isso que ele conta para Konohamaru, o neto tampinha do líder da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Meu Nome É Konohamaru - T01E02

programme.title: 2020. Para se tornar um ninja, Naruto precisa formar uma equipe com seus colegas, a bela Sakura e o sério Sasuke, que têm uma coisa em comum: o ódio que sentem por Naruto. Então, Naruto tenta conquistar Sakura fingindo ser a paixão da vida dela... Sasuke! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos
programme.desc: Naruto: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos - T01E03

programme.title: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04

programme.title: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08

programme.title: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09

programme.title: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10

programme.title: Death Note - T01E22
programme.desc: 2008. Misa consegue sucesso ao reduzir a um suspeito a identidade de Kira dentro do Grupo Yotsuba: Higuchi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Death Note - T01E23
programme.desc: 2008. Higuchi do Grupo Yotsuba, tenta matar Matsuda do corpo especial. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E25
programme.desc: 1995. Guile enfrenta o poderoso Zangief. Fei-Long confronta Cammy no hospital. Ryu é forçado a lutar contra Ken sob o controle de Bison. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E26
programme.desc: 1995. Zangief tem vantagem sobre Guile. Ken é obrigado a se defender contra Ryu. Cammy e Fei-Long continuam a lutar no hospital. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E139

programme.sub-title: O Jutsu da Mente que Perdeu para Batatinhas
programme.desc: 2020. Inojin aborda seus pais sobre dominar o jutsu de transferência de mente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: As Rodadas Finais : A Corrida Para Arena De Batalha - T01E59
programme.sub-title: As Rodadas Finais : A Corrida Para Arena De Batalha
programme.desc: 2020. O dia da prova chega finalmente. O primeiro oponente de Naruto é Neji Hyuga. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Byakugan Contra O Jutsu Clones Das Sombras! - T01E60
programme.sub-title: Byakugan Contra O Jutsu Clones Das Sombras!
programme.desc: 2020. Finalmente, a Prova Chunin começa com oito ninjas que foram qualificados nas preliminares. Mas ninguém sabe onde Sasuke está. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero! - T01E61
programme.sub-title: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto não consegue usar o Jutsu Clones das Sombras contra Neji que consegue ver seu pontos de chacra! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Verdadeiro Poder Do Fracassado! - T01E62
programme.desc: 2020. A batalha entre Naruto e Neji continua, e Neji demonstra seu enorme poder. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Feras Ressuscitadas! - T01E28
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas da equipe guy se preocupam com o resultado da luta desesperada de sakura e vovó chiyo, enquanto enfrentam suas cópias. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Kakashi Iluminado - T01E29
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura corre para achar naruto com a vovó chiyo, que está sofrendo com o veneno. Os membros da equipe guy correm paraajudar a equipe kakashi. Enquanto isso, com as preparações completas, kakashi revela seu mangekyo sharingan. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Estética De Um Momento - T01E30
programme.desc: 2007. Na Aldeia da Folha, a equipe de Konohamaru foi promovida a Genin e agora está sob a supervisão de Ebisu. Um Naruto mais velho chega à aldeia após uma longa jornada de treinamento com Jiraiya. Naruto Uzumaki está de volta! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.desc: 2008. Light recuperou suas memórias, em seguida dá ordens a Misa que retome os assassinatos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.desc: 1995. Guile derrota Zangief, mas acaba recebendo uma surpresa trágica. Fei-Long explica a Cammy que foi enganada pela Shadaloo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E28
programme.desc: 1995. A grande explosão causada pelo Hadou combinado de Ryu e Ken desloca o chip da cabeça de Ryu e destrói toda a base. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.sub-title: Um Teste de Força de Vontade

programme.sub-title: Motivação Zero : O Cara Com Inveja Da Nuvem

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Legado - T01E31

programme.title: Country Strong
programme.desc: Personal demons, complicated romantic entanglements and the demands of fame threaten to derail the comeback tour of a country-music superstar (Gwyneth Paltrow). Starring Gwyneth Paltrow, Tim McGraw, Garrett Hedlund.

programme.title: Across the Universe
programme.desc: Songs by the Beatles illustrate a tale of two star-crossed lovers (Evan Rachel Wood, Jim Sturgess) swept up by the 1960s counterculture and the anti-war movement. Starring Evan Rachel Wood, Jim Sturgess, Joe Anderson.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie is out to prove herself as a cop and avenge the death of her best friend, Junior; Frankie teams up with his cousin; there is a new deadly drug in town called Great White.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackies new partner, Leslie, matches her ambition perfectly as their relationship deepens on and off the force; Frankie and Jorge continue moving ahead, but Charmaine, their New York connection, is a wild card.

programme.title: Below Her Mouth
programme.desc: An unexpected affair between two women develops into a passionate connection that changes their lives. Starring Natalie Krill, Erika Linder, Mayko Nguyen.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: A privileged man-child arrives at the beautiful and remote coastal cabin of his estranged father, whom he hasnt seen in 30 years. He quickly discovers that not only is his dad a jerk, he also has a shady past that is rushing to catch up with him. Starring Elijah Wood, Stephen McHattie, Martin Donovan.

programme.title: Being Canadian
programme.desc: Rob Cohen tries to find out what it really means to be Canadian.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: FBI Agent Abby Corrigans life is endangered after she is suddenly attacked by an unfamiliar Abnormal during an investigation; Magnus and Wills heated debate over the best way to help Abby threatens to permanently alter their relationship.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Nikola Tesla get stuck in a virtual Sanctuary world at the mercy of the avatar of Adam Worth.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: In the 1960s Oklahoma a sensitive youth gets in over his head when his best friend kills a member of a rival gang. Starring Matt Dillon, C. Thomas Howell, Ralph Macchio.

programme.title: Space Jam
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to win a basketball match and earn their freedom, the Looney Tunes seek the aid of retired basketball champion, Michael Jordan. Starring Wayne Knight, Theresa Randle, Danny DeVito.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: A police officer joins a secret organization that polices and monitors extraterrestrial interactions on Earth. Starring Tommy Lee Jones, Will Smith, Linda Fiorentino.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Two interstellar agents try to stop an alien disguised as a lingerie model from destroying the world. Starring Tommy Lee Jones, Will Smith, Rip Torn.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J travels in time to M.I.B.s early days in 1969 to stop an alien from assassinating his friend Agent K and changing history. Starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Josh Brolin.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A New Jersey teen (Ralph Macchio) moves to California, meets bullies and learns karate from a handyman, Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita). Starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita, Elisabeth Shue.

programme.title: Ladder 49
programme.desc: Trapped in a burning building, a firefighter (Joaquin Phoenix) reflects on his life and career as he awaits rescue from his captain (John Travolta) and colleagues. Starring Joaquin Phoenix, John Travolta, Jacinda Barrett.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie abandons her stakeout for a fiery confrontation; Ray is humiliated again, and he does what he can to get back on the force.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie and Leslie get deeper into the case, and with each other; someone will make a decision they will regret.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: Singer David Bowie reinvents himself as Ziggy Stardust while touring America to promote his new album "The Man Who Sold the World." Starring Johnny Flynn, Jena Malone, Marc Maron.

programme.title: Double Happiness
programme.desc: Pleasing her Chinese-Canadian father (Stephen Chang) means an aspiring actress (Sandra Oh) must sacrifice her own pursuits. Starring Sandra Oh, Stephen A. Chang, Alannah Ong.

programme.title: Heavenly Bodies
programme.desc: Samantha quits her job to open an aerobics studio and competes with a larger clubs lead instructor to become an aerobics instructor on a local fitness television show. Starring Cynthia Dale, Richard Rebiere, Walter George Alton.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Kate warns Magnus about some Abnormals plotting a terrorist attack; she and Addison learn that Bigfoot may be a part of the terrorist cell.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Seeking to outrace the SCIU, Magnus and Will are captured, injured and trapped in a Bolivian cave in; alone, the two friends struggle to survive as they confront who they are and who theyve become.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Born without the ability to sing, a young emperor penguin (Elijah Wood) expresses himself and hopes to attract a mate through his amazing dancing talent. Starring Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Reluctant to dance, the son of Mumble (Elijah Wood) the tap-dancing penguin runs away from home and meets a penguin that can fly. Starring Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Hank Azaria.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: An abandoned boy (Jason James Richter) with a chip on his shoulder befriends an ill-fated killer whale at a water park. Starring Jason James Richter, Lori Petty, Jayne Atkinson.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Dedicated teams in Africa and Borneo save the lives of orphaned elephants and orangutans and prepare them for release back into the wild.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: When the satellites designed to control the global climate start to attack Earth, its a race to uncover the real threat before a worldwide Geostorm wipes out everything and everyone. Starring Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess, Abbie Cornish.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: When a new global ice-age threatens the world, a climatologist tries to figure out a way to save humanity, and attempts to get to his young son in New York. Starring Dennis Quaid, Jake Gyllenhaal, Ian Holm.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: Fortified in a massive, armored truck, loner Mad Max joins Imperator Furiosa and her band of rebels as they try to outrun a warlord and his henchmen in a deadly high-speed chase through the wasteland. Starring Tom Hardy, Charlize Theron, Nicholas Hoult.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: A post-apocalyptic ice age forces humanitys last survivors aboard a globe-spanning supertrain. One man will risk everything to lead a revolt for control of the engine and the future of the world. Starring Chris Evans, Song Kang-ho, Tilda Swinton.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Jackie and Ray both realize a distressing truth; Frankie feels threatened; Renee proves herself to be ruthless.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Its the day before Thanksgiving on the Cape; things are looking up for Ray and looking grim for Jackie; Frankie is filled with anxiety over his business with Jorge.

programme.title: Atanarjuat
programme.desc: A depiction of the Inuit people of the Canadian arctic, telling the story of a crime that ruptures the trust within a closely knit group and how justice is achieved and healing begins. Starring Natar Ungalaaq, Sylvia Ivalu, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The new Abnormal Homeland is in danger, forcing Helen Magnus into a corner; she has a plan that no one would suspect.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The new Abnormal Homeland is in danger, forcing Helen Magnus into a corner; she has a plan that no one would suspect.

programme.title: Blizzard
programme.desc: A youngster learns about true friendship with the help of a magically gifted reindeer from the North Pole. Starring Brenda Blethyn, Christopher Plummer, Kevin Pollak.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Starring Brandon Engman, Ashley Boettcher, Alison Brie.

programme.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
programme.desc: Determined twins (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) try to trick an evil aunt (Cloris Leachman) out of a magic moonstone and save their family home. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Cloris Leachman.

programme.title: Tia and Piujuq
programme.desc: A 10-year-old Syrian refugee living in Montreal finds a magic portal leading to the Arctic. Starring Tia Bshara, Madeline Ivalu, Nuvvija Tulugarjuk.

programme.title: The Games Maker
programme.desc: Ivans love of board games transports him into the competitive world of game invention. Starring Joseph Fiennes, Tom Cavanagh, Megan Charpentier.

programme.title: The Master of Disguise
programme.desc: A genial waiter (Dana Carvey) tries to rescue his parents from a criminal mastermind by assuming various identities. Starring Dana Carvey, Jennifer Esposito, Harold Gould.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Friends and former teammates (Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock) learn that age does not, necessarily, equal maturity when they reunite to honor the memory of their basketball coach. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: Lenny Feder moves his family back to his hometown to be with his old friends and finds out that he didnt leave the crazy life behind in Los Angeles. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Monsieur Lazhar
programme.desc: A recent emigrant (Fellag) of Algeria takes over a Canadian classroom after a teachers tragic death. Starring Mohamed Fellag, Sophie Nelisse, Émilien Neron.

programme.title: Before My Heart Falls
programme.desc: A teenager has a key moment in her life before she commits an act she will always regret. Starring Clemence Dufresne-Deslières, Étienne Laforge, Sophie Lorain.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Its Thanksgiving, but the drugs and despair dont let up: Frankie, riding an ocean of anxiety, takes Renee to the point of no return, Ray is going all in on a case no one wants him on and Alans dinner is interrupted.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Ray is so close to getting everything he wants, but he has to maneuver things just right; Jackie comes to a crossroad and must choose how to move forward.

programme.title: Being Julia
programme.desc: In 1938 London a theatrical actress (Annette Bening) devises an elaborate scheme against the social climber who used her. Starring Annette Bening, Jeremy Irons, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: A Dog of Flanders
programme.desc: Based on the famous 19th-century novel, this is the tale of a Flemish boy who finds himself alone in the world until he meets painter Piet van Gelder, who takes the boy in and encourages his artistic talents. Starring David Ladd, Donald Crisp, Theodore Bikel.

programme.title: A Countess From Hong Kong
programme.desc: A Russian countess (Sophia Loren) stows away in the stateroom of a married U.S. diplomat (Marlon Brando) bound for New York. Starring Marlon Brando, Sophia Loren, Tippi Hedren.

programme.title: It Started in Naples
programme.desc: A Philadelphia lawyer (Clark Gable) goes to Italy to wrest his orphan nephew from a stripper aunt (Sophia Loren). Starring Clark Gable, Sophia Loren, Vittorio De Sica.

programme.title: Marriage Italian Style
programme.desc: A rich businessmans (Marcello Mastroianni) former mistress (Sophia Loren) tricks him into matrimony. Starring Sophia Loren, Marcello Mastroianni, Aldo Puglisi.

programme.title: Ghosts -- Italian Style
programme.desc: A crooked secret-admirer (Mario Adorf) lets a married couple (Sophia Loren, Vittorio Gassman) stay in his supposedly haunted palace. Starring Sophia Loren, Vittorio Gassman, Mario Adorf.

programme.title: A Special Day
programme.desc: A housewife (Sophia Loren) encounters a homosexual broadcaster (Marcello Mastroianni) on the day Hitler meets Mussolini in 1938 Rome. Starring Sophia Loren, Marcello Mastroianni, John Vernon.

programme.title: MGM Parade
programme.desc: Robert Benchley; Tony Martin; host George Murphy.

programme.title: Made in Paris
programme.desc: A fashion buyer (Ann-Margret) sent to Paris attracts a charmer (Louis Jourdan), a newsman (Richard Crenna) and her boss son. Starring Ann-Margret, Louis Jourdan, Richard Crenna.

programme.title: The Young Girls of Rochefort
programme.desc: Dancing/composing twin sisters (Catherine Deneuve, Françoise Dorleac) find romance in Paris, one with a sailor, the other with a U.S. pianist (Jacques Perrin). Starring Catherine Deneuve, Françoise Dorleac, Jacques Perrin.

programme.title: The Swan
programme.desc: A European princess (Grace Kelly) waltzes with her tutor (Louis Jourdan) but is destined to marry a crown prince (Alec Guinness). Starring Grace Kelly, Alec Guinness, Louis Jourdan.

programme.title: Oklahoma!
programme.desc: Cowboy Curly (Gordon MacRae) loves Laurey (Shirley Jones) despite hired hand Jud Fry (Rod Steiger). Rodgers and Hammerstein songs include Oh What a Beautiful Mornin. Starring Gordon MacRae, Shirley Jones, Rod Steiger.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: An English orphan (Margaret OBrien) finds the key to her bitter uncles (Herbert Marshall) magic garden, seen in color. Starring Margaret OBrien, Herbert Marshall, Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Picnic at Hanging Rock
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Australia, three young schoolgirls wander away from a school picnic and become lost in the bush. Starring Rachel Roberts, Dominic Guard, Helen Morse.

programme.title: The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: An aging actress, upset by suggestions that she is too old for her role in a play, travels to Rome, where she begins a steamy affair with a young Italian gigolo. Starring Vivien Leigh, Warren Beatty, Lotte Lenya.

programme.title: One Way Passage
programme.desc: A condemned man (William Powell) and dying woman (Kay Francis) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring William Powell, Kay Francis, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: A cabaret singer (Kay Francis) stands trial in Warsaw for killing a concert pianist (Basil Rathbone) to save her daughters honor. Starring Kay Francis, Basil Rathbone, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Give Me Your Heart
programme.desc: An American lawyers (George Brent) wife (Kay Francis) is reunited with her child and his father, an English nobleman (Patric Knowles). Starring Kay Francis, George Brent, Patric Knowles.

programme.title: Man Wanted
programme.desc: A businesswoman (Kay Francis) makes a salesman (David Manners) her secretary and has him take dictation. Starring Kay Francis, David Manners, Andy Devine.

programme.title: My Bill
programme.desc: A boy (Dickie Moore) brings good fortune to his widowed mother (Kay Francis), abandoned by her three other children. Starring Kay Francis, Dickie Moore, Bonita Granville.

programme.title: The Keyhole
programme.desc: A private eye (George Brent) follows a millionaires wife (Kay Francis) to Havana, where they fall in love. Starring Kay Francis, George Brent, Glenda Farrell.

programme.title: The House on 56th Street
programme.desc: A woman (Kay Francis) loves a rich man (Gene Raymond), spends 20 years in prison, then teams up with a Roaring 20s card shark (Ricardo Cortez). Starring Kay Francis, Ricardo Cortez, Gene Raymond.

programme.title: The Amazing Dr. Clitterhouse
programme.desc: A criminologist (Edward G. Robinson) joins a hoodlums (Humphrey Bogart) gang, becomes its mastermind and stands trial for murder. Starring Edward G. Robinson, Claire Trevor, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Valley of the Giants
programme.desc: A lumberman (Wayne Morris) and a gambling-house woman (Claire Trevor) thwart Easterners eyeing the California redwoods. Starring Wayne Morris, Claire Trevor, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Best of the Badmen
programme.desc: A Union officer (Robert Ryan) joins the outlaw James and Younger brothers against a bounty hunter (Robert Preston). Starring Robert Ryan, Claire Trevor, Robert Preston.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A federal agent (Fred MacMurray) and a policewoman (Claire Trevor) track a Mexican drug ring, each unaware the other is undercover. Starring Fred MacMurray, Claire Trevor, Raymond Burr.

programme.title: Born to Kill
programme.desc: A private eye (Walter Slezak) hunts a killer (Lawrence Tierney) who marries a divorcees (Claire Trevor) rich sister. Starring Lawrence Tierney, Claire Trevor, Walter Slezak.

programme.title: Murder, My Sweet
programme.desc: The search for a missing person plunges detective Philip Marlowe into a deadly web of blackmail and murder. Starring Dick Powell, Claire Trevor, Anne Shirley.

programme.title: Key Largo
programme.desc: A gangster (Edward G. Robinson) holds a GI (Humphrey Bogart) and others hostage in a run-down Florida Keys hotel. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Edward G. Robinson, Lauren Bacall.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: An outlaw (John Wayne), a prostitute (Claire Trevor), a drunken doctor and assorted others go through Indian country. Starring John Wayne, Claire Trevor, Andy Devine.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Navy nurse Nellie (Mitzi Gaynor) falls for plantation-owner Emile (Rossano Brazzi), who accepts a top-secret World War II mission. Starring Mitzi Gaynor, Rossano Brazzi, John Kerr.

programme.title: Fanny
programme.desc: In Marseille a young woman (Leslie Caron) remeets Marius, the father of her child, when her aged husband (Maurice Chevalier) is dying. Starring Leslie Caron, Maurice Chevalier, Charles Boyer.

programme.title: Camelot
programme.desc: King Arthur (Richard Harris) loses Guinevere (Vanessa Redgrave) to trusted Sir Lancelot (Franco Nero) in the colorful court of Camelot. Starring Richard Harris, Vanessa Redgrave, Franco Nero.

programme.title: Tall Story
programme.desc: Gamblers, a coed (Jane Fonda) and an ethics exam force answers from a college basketball player (Anthony Perkins). Starring Anthony Perkins, Jane Fonda, Ray Walston.

programme.title: The Big City
programme.desc: An independent cabby (Spencer Tracy) and his Russian wife (Luise Rainer) fight corrupt competition in New York. Starring Spencer Tracy, Luise Rainer, Charley Grapewin.

programme.title: Flirtation Walk
programme.desc: A West Point cadet (Dick Powell) puts on a show with a generals daughter (Ruby Keeler) he once loved and lost in Hawaii. Starring Dick Powell, Ruby Keeler, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: Green Light
programme.desc: A surgeon (Errol Flynn) shoulders a colleagues fatal mistake and endures blame from the victims daughter (Anita Louise). Starring Errol Flynn, Anita Louise, Margaret Lindsay.

programme.title: Living on Velvet
programme.desc: The shaken survivor (George Brent) of a family plane crash falls in love with his buddys (Warren William) girlfriend (Kay Francis). Starring Kay Francis, George Brent, Warren William.

programme.title: The Mortal Storm
programme.desc: An Austrian farmer (James Stewart) and a professors daughter (Margaret Sullavan) flee Nazi Germany on skis. Starring Margaret Sullavan, James Stewart, Robert Young.

programme.title: Seven Sweethearts
programme.desc: A Michigan reporter (Van Heflin) woos the youngest (Kathryn Grayson) of seven Dutch sisters who cannot wed until the eldest (Marsha Hunt) weds. Starring Kathryn Grayson, Van Heflin, Marsha Hunt.

programme.title: Shipmates Forever
programme.desc: An admirals (Lewis Stone) rebellious son (Dick Powell) shapes up and sings for a dancer (Ruby Keeler) at Annapolis. Starring Dick Powell, Ruby Keeler, Lewis Stone.

programme.title: Strange Cargo
programme.desc: An island convict (Clark Gable), his girlfriend (Joan Crawford) and other lost souls escape in a sailboat with a Christlike man (Ian Hunter). Starring Joan Crawford, Clark Gable, Ian Hunter.

programme.desc: A widowed mother fights for her cotton farm with a laborer and a blind boarder in the 1930s Texas. Starring Sally Field, Lindsay Crouse, John Malkovich.

programme.title: Tender Mercies
programme.desc: A divorced country singer (Robert Duvall) stops drinking and starts over with a loving widow (Tess Harper). Starring Robert Duvall, Tess Harper, Betty Buckley.

programme.title: A Well Spent Life
programme.desc: A tribute to the Texas musical performer Mance Lipscomb. Starring Mance Lipscomb, Elnora Lipscomb.

programme.desc: A Texas oilmans (Robert Stack) sister makes him doubt his wife (Lauren Bacall) and best friend (Rock Hudson). Starring Rock Hudson, Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack.

programme.desc: The story of Edna Gladney (Greer Garson), founder of the Texas Childrens Home and Aid Society of Fort Worth. Starring Greer Garson, Walter Pidgeon, Felix Bressart.

programme.desc: The story of Ramiro Cristales, who was sent to Canada after news leaked in Guatemala of his survival; the story of the unsolved murder of Stefano Savioli.

programme.title: Trapped in the Spotlight
programme.desc: A psychotic music producer kidnaps a cancelled RandB singer and her former co-star 15 years after they broke up. With their lives and legacies on the line, the estranged duo must face the demons from their past to make it out alive. Starring Monique Coleman, Melyssa Ford, Emmanuel Kabongo.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her home, her infant son left unharmed just feet away. With no forced entry and few clues, the case goes cold for decades, until groundbreaking DNA technology leads investigators to an unexpected answer.

programme.title: Balancing Act
programme.desc: Seven centuries after Marco Polo traveled along the Silk Road, acrobats from more than a dozen countries converge on the city of Hangzhou to stage a spectacle designed to bridge the cultural gap between East and West.

programme.title: Mary J. Bliges Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues. Their relationship reaches a boiling point when Ben secretly helps his brother, while Kendra returns to the city and reunites with an old friend. Starring Ajiona Alexus, DaVinchi, Princess Davis.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When the wife of a famous New Orleans sportscaster is shot in the face point blank, the killing looks random, but the play-by-play becomes more scandalous with time.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When a congregant is found in the church office bleeding from gunshot wounds to the head, police question the new pastor who leads the investigation to an ungodly discovery.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her home, her infant son left unharmed just feet away. With no forced entry and few clues, the case goes cold for decades, until groundbreaking DNA technology leads investigators to an unexpected answer.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Security footage gives police a different point of view than the one Lee Rodarte Jr. is presenting after 21-year-old Savannah Gold goes missing; interrogators must navigate restaurant romance while trying to find out exactly what happened.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A woman is reporting missing while visiting her boyfriend, Robert, in New Mexico; as Robert begins to explain the events that led to her disappearance, holes in his story bring the whole event into question.

programme.title: Mary J. Bliges Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues. Their relationship reaches a boiling point when Ben secretly helps his brother, while Kendra returns to the city and reunites with an old friend. Starring Ajiona Alexus, DaVinchi, Princess Davis.

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: Ted and Amanda save Raphs life and solve Julians murder, only to be faced with rescuing Teds family from a predator who has had Ted in his crosshairs for years.

programme.title: Psycho Therapy: The Shallow Tale of a Writer Who Decided to Write About a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction. Starring Steve Buscemi, John Magaro, Britt Lower.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A retired teacher takes a solo Great Lakes cruise toward a family reunion; but when she doesnt check in with her family members back home, her loved ones begins to suspect something bad has befallen her.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A German college student working aboard on a cruise ship goes missing at an Alaskan port; did she decide to skip out on her duties or did a terrible fate await her on-shore?

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Afrikka Hardy in 2014 turns out to be a catalyst for the investigation that ultimately exposes the crimes committed by Darren Deon Vann.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: On August 26, 2011, Amanda Plasse becomes the victim of a brutal murder; it takes years before the culprit gets arrested and her mother also fights to pass a law that prevents unauthorized sharing of crime scene photos.

programme.title: Fatal Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: A couple couldnt be happier after buying their dream home from a mysterious man named Josh. However, their newfound paradise turns into a living nightmare as Josh seems unwilling to let the house go. Starring Jasmine Aivaliotis, Philip McElroy, Duke Van Patten.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on Thanksgiving Day, leaving behind a mystery that stuns a small Colorado town. As investigators dig into her disappearance, they uncover a chilling plot fueled by deception, betrayal, and a desperate fight for control.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back. Starring Emma Tremblay, Jacob Buster, Will Forte.

Starring Camille Stopps, Jacob Richter, George Krissa.

programme.title: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Point North caters its first wedding and the team celebrate with a huge night out; Carly learns some important news about the future of the restaurant.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: Counting down his last days as chief of police in the tiny town of Lone Crow, John Hawkins must investigate one last case when a mangled body with uncanny wounds washes up on the shores of the Porcupine River. Starring Allan Hawco, Emily Alatalo, Natalie Brown.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: James Lally admits that he has killed his partner Suzanne LaPierre; it takes more than confession for police to locate her body, leading authorities to a long interrogation with a character who seems more concerned with his own comfort.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A messy divorce leads to a woman hiding a large sum of money with one of her close friends; when the woman goes missing, her friend, Ashley, is believed to be involved in more than just attempted fraud.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Just outside Athens, Wis., Kenneth Kunz finds four of his family members murdered and one missing; investigators determine whether it was his mother, a local farm boy, or the rumored family drug dealing connections that led to the brutal slayings.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: The chief of police in Sparta, Mich., leads an investigation into what happened to his family friend and babysitter, who is reported missing when she doesnt come home from Christmas shopping, and is found beneath a snow bank weeks later.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young Navy wife is brutally murdered while home alone in Norfolk, Va.; DNA and genetic genealogy lead to a shocking truth, her killer is linked to another long-unsolved crime, hiding an even darker secret.

programme.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
programme.desc: After a masked intruder assaults Morgan Metzer in her home, her ex-husband, Rodney, shows up minutes later. Questioned by the authorities, Rodneys story doesnt seem to add up, making him the prime suspect in the attack. Starring Jana Kramer, Austin Nichols, J. Barrett Cooper.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: Steve participates in a bachelor auction where a beautiful young bidder turns out to be a front for an older woman.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Boy Trouble
programme.desc: A sexist school board member ignores Reginas funding proposal while green-lighting Steves harebrained ideas.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Guess Whos Not Coming to Counseling
programme.desc: Steve poses as Lovitas fiance when Cedric cant attend a counseling session with a renowned minister.

programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out a Sunday dinner; its a homestyle recipe for slow-simmered short ribs and gravy served along with collard green and cabbage mix thats tender and well seasoned.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - A Taste of Brazil
programme.desc: Yo-Yo gives a taste of Brazils culture through the food, with some traditional, flavorful dishes; she cooks up a Moqueca, which is a Brazilian seafood Stew; toasted homemade garlic bread; a traditional Brazilian drink called the caipirinha.

programme.desc: The deceased mother of three women returns to Earth as an angel to help them rediscover what is truly important in life.

programme.title: The Love Letter
programme.desc: An advice columnist (Keshia Knight Pulliam) uncovers her true feelings after writing an anonymous letter to herself.

programme.desc: Now that Devin is out of the house, Lisa suffers from empty nest syndrome and decides to enroll in community college; Melindas new boyfriend offers to buy Tonys business.

programme.desc: Ebony prepares for homecoming and gets some advice from her mother and aunts about who should be her escort; Melinda helps Tony with his taxes.

programme.desc: Tony becomes great friends with Cheryls new love, Maxwell; Lisa develops an online shopping addiction.

programme.desc: As Halloween approaches, Tony grows suspicious of his new neighbors; Ebony feels uncertain about attending her debutante ball, even though it is a family tradition.

programme.desc: In the blue water waves of Mafia Island, Tanzania, a love story begins; Malick and Dodoma are dedicated islanders who believe true love is a gift.

programme.desc: Tony and Lisa try to have some alone time since they are kid-free for the weekend, but everyone keeps interrupting.

programme.desc: Devin brings home a friend from college for Thanksgiving break; Lori invites her new man to join the family for Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.desc: Leaders of the worlds wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: The Longest War
programme.desc: The human stories and drama behind Americas involvement in Afghanistan, now the longest war in U.S. history; features interviews with intelligence operatives, soldiers, families, Afghan officials, journalists, and government and military officials.

programme.title: Deadlock (2021)
programme.desc: A retired Army ranger must save thousands of innocent lives when a rogue team of mercenaries brutally seizes an energy plant and holds everyone inside hostage.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A mans (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a truckers (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A detective (Morgan Freeman) and a Secret Service agent (Monica Potter) investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Wrong Turn (2021)
programme.desc: Despite warnings to stick to the Appalachian Trail, hikers stray off course and cross into land inhabited by a hidden community of mountain dwellers who use deadly means to protect their way of life.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2 (2010)
programme.desc: After experiencing what they think are break-ins, a family realizes that the events unfolding before them are more sinister than they seem.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)
programme.desc: A videographer becomes obsessed with finding the source of disturbing late-night noises in his home and discovers its terrifying origin.

programme.title: Hard Rain (1998)
programme.desc: A thief (Morgan Freeman), a sheriff (Randy Quaid) and the nephew (Christian Slater) of an armored-truck driver seek money bags in a flooding Indiana town.

programme.title: Undisputed III: Redemption (2010)
programme.desc: Uri Boyka is an inmate trapped in the toughest prison in the world. He is ready to make his comeback in a lethal boxing competition for a shot at freedom.

programme.title: The Honey Trap: A True Story of Love, Lies and the FBI
programme.desc: The story of Denis Cuspert, aka Deso Dogg, and his journey from infamous German rapper to ISIS recruiter; exploring the circular relationship between propaganda, recruitment and the soft power of entertainment culture.

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: In order to save mankind, scientists and astronauts must set off a nuclear device at the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Halls sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Jack Reacher (2012)
programme.desc: A defense attorney hires an enigmatic ex-Army investigator to tackle the case of a highly trained sniper who apparently murdered five people at random.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa (2013)
programme.desc: Irving Zisman (Johnny Knoxville) takes his young and impressionable grandson (Jackson Nicoll) on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie (2002)
programme.desc: Nitwits (Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Chris Pontius) perform outrageous stunts and pull practical jokes on an unsuspecting public.

programme.title: Django Unchained (2012)
programme.desc: A former slave (Jamie Foxx) joins forces with the German bounty hunter (Christoph Waltz) who freed him and helps hunt down the Souths most-wanted criminals, all in the hope of finding his long-lost wife (Kerry Washington).

programme.title: If You Lust Me
programme.desc: A young woman puts the age-old adage of love at first sight to the test when a stranger professes his undying devotion. But is he sincere or is it just another con by some hustler trying to get her in bed? She decides to give him a test... of sorts..

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn (1996)
programme.desc: Desperado brothers (George Clooney, Quentin Tarantino) kidnap a preacher (Harvey Keitel) and his kids, commandeer their RV and wind up in a Mexican strip joint where vampires lurk.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a familys new home.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4 (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager (Kathryn Newton) bears witness to terrifying events that occur when she and her family become the temporary caretakers of a creepy neighbor boy.

programme.title: Wander (2020)
programme.desc: Hired to investigate a suspicious death in the town of Wander, a paranoid private eye with a troubled past becomes convinced the case is linked to the same conspiracy and cover-up that caused the death of his daughter.

programme.title: Chuck (2016)
programme.desc: Liquor salesman and part-time prizefighter Chuck Wepner gets the chance to take on Muhammad Ali in a highly publicized title fight, launching him to sudden fame.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: No Code of Conduct (1998)
programme.desc: Two policemen (Mark Dacascos, Charlie Sheen) learn that city leaders and law enforcement support heroin trafficking across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Cypher (2002)
programme.desc: A man (Jeremy Northam) soon becomes confused about his own identity after he becomes a corporate spy for each of two rival firms.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Sound of Violence (2021)
programme.desc: A young killer experiences intense pleasure whenever she hears the sound of human pain.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Jennys Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Monstrous (2022)
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life. Still traumatized, their fragile existence is pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.sub-title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.desc: Friends and lovers try to navigate their way through the complexities of modern relationships, sometimes misconstruing the true intentions of the opposite sex.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A teenage girl (Hailee Steinfeld) enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her fathers killer (Josh Brolin).

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: The Silent Planet (2024)
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: Certain Women (2016)
programme.desc: Three strong-willed women (Kristen Stewart, Laura Dern, Michelle Williams) strive to forge their own paths amidst the wide-open plains of the American Northwest.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: The Space Between Us (2017)
programme.desc: On his maiden voyage to Earth, the first human (Asa Butterfield) born on Mars experiences the joys and wonders of a new world while trying to unravel the mysteries of his existence.
